# notificationType

**Instance Property**

The type of notification.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute String notificationType;
```

## Discussion

Possible values are described in [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/notification-types].

## Getting the Notification Type

- **isQueryNotification**: A Boolean value indicating whether this push notification is a query notification.
- **isRecordZoneNotification**: A Boolean value indicating whether this notification is a push notification that was sent because of changes to a record zone.
